eyebrow.zh: 离线 · 无 API key · < 10 秒

headline.zh:
Agent 说改了的
到底改没改
headline.en:
Did the agent really
do what it claimed

sub.zh: agentlie 把每一轮 Agent 自然语言里的 fix / add / remove / rename / update claim 抽出来，跟那一轮真实的 Edit/Write 做 AST delta 对比，翻车的那几行标红。
sub.en: agentlie extracts every fix / add / remove / rename / update claim from an agent's own words each turn, checks it against the real Edit/Write calls with an AST delta, and flags the lies in red.

title.zh: 逐轮 claim ↔ edit 对仗

body.zh: parser 顺着 parentUuid 把 .jsonl 走成按轮的 DAG，用 toolUseResult.originalFile 钉住每个文件的 before/after 真值；extractor 抽出每轮的 claim，verifier 与那一轮真实的 edit 对仗。
body.en: The parser walks the .jsonl into a per-turn DAG along parentUuid, pinning each file's before/after truth from toolUseResult.originalFile; the extractor pulls each turn's claims and the verifier matches them against that turn's real edits.

body.zh: verifier 用 tree-sitter 算 Python / TypeScript / Go / Rust / Java / Ruby 的 AST delta，按动词判定必要变更是否真的发生 —— 不是简单 string 比对。
body.en: The verifier computes an AST delta for Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust, Java and Ruby with tree-sitter, judging per verb whether the required change actually happened — not a naive string match.

body.zh: report 把结果渲染成 PASS / VAGUE / LIE 彩色表 —— path_untouched、no_target 这些证据直接摆出来，红的那几行就是 Agent 谎报的 fix。
body.en: The reporter renders a PASS / VAGUE / LIE table with the evidence spelled out — path_untouched, no_target — so the red rows are exactly the fixes the agent lied about.

title.zh: 离线 · 跨框架即插即用

body.zh: 默认 --offline：不登录、不需 API key、不上传任何日志；200 轮会话本地跑完 < 10 秒；不绑定具体 agent 框架。
body.en: Default --offline: no login, no API key, no logs uploaded; a 200-turn session runs locally in under 10 seconds; not tied to any one agent framework.

headline.zh: 验一次你的上一场会话

sub.zh: MIT 许可，pip install agentlie；指向最近一次 Claude Code 会话就出判定表。
sub.en: MIT-licensed, pip install agentlie; point it at your latest Claude Code session for the verdict table.
